overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a soldier in tactical gear exploring a dimly lit industrial warehouse facility. The character navigates through storage corridors, ascends concrete stairwells, and discovers a casualty before continuing through upper level hallways toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor storage corridor with wooden crates and metal lockers

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the industrial storage corridor, navigating between wooden crates and green metal lockers

metal staircase structure visible on upper level
rough unfinished concrete walls with industrial texture

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial storage corridor on the ground floor. Wooden crates and green metal lockers line the path while overhead stairs are visible in the distance. The environment is dimly lit with warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with metal railings and fluorescent lighting

events.description: character discovers a dead body lying on the stair landing to the left

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs, passing a casualty on the landing while heading toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: dead body in dark tactical clothing lying motionless on the stair landing

entered.detail: worn concrete steps with yellow safety markings
rusted metal handrails along the staircase
wall-mounted fluorescent tube lights illuminating the stairwell
closed red metal industrial door at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow concrete stairwell with metal railings. At approximately 27 seconds, the character passes a dead body lying on the left side of the landing. The stairwell is lit by sparse fluorescent lights, and a red metal door is visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level concrete corridor with red metal doors

events.description: approaching an open red door revealing a blue-lit room beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor toward an open doorway emitting blue light, suggesting an exit or new area

entered.detail: wooden desk with scattered papers and office items
open red metal door leading to a blue-lit area
atmospheric blue light visible through the open doorway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an upper level corridor with tiled flooring and red metal doors along the walls. The character passes a wooden desk and approaches an open red door at the end of the hallway, through which blue light is visible, indicating a transition to a new area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from a ground-floor storage area to an upper-level corridor. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor lined with wooden crates and green metal lockers under warm artificial lighting. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts upward into a concrete stairwell with metal railings, passing a casualty on the landing beneath sparse fluorescent lights. The movement then continues toward a red metal door at the top of the stairs, emerging onto an upper level characterized by tiled flooring and additional red doors. Finally, the camera passes a wooden desk and approaches an open doorway at the end of the hallway, where the warm interior tones give way to a bright blue light.
